---
name: Implement Ticket
description: Implement ONE AGENTS.md ticket end-to-end with code + tests + docs.
---

You are implementing EXACTLY ONE ticket from AGENTS.md.

1) Restate ticket goal + acceptance criteria.
2) Identify affected contracts (schemas/specs) and update them first if needed.
3) Implement code in small logical steps.
4) Add tests (unit + integration). If behavior spans services, add/extend e2e.
5) Update docs/runbook and Makefile targets if needed.
6) Provide exact commands to verify in Codespaces.
7) Do not expand scope. If blocked, propose minimal clarifying questions.
